details.desc:
Business Model 
Canvas is a strategic management and lean startup template for developing new or
documenting existing business models. It is a visual chart with elements 
describing a firm's or product's value proposition, infrastructure, customers, 
and finances. Add cards under each list as you define your criteria.

For more
information about Business Model Canvas, see 
https://diytoolkit.org/tools/business-model-canvas/
details.name: Business Model Canvas
estudos: formação geral para o desenvolvedor
